name: Frontend Performance Dashboard
description: Comprehensive frontend monitoring dashboard with user experience metrics

nrql.query: SELECT count(*) FROM FrontendPageView TIMESERIES 15 minutes SINCE 6 hours ago
SELECT average(duration) FROM FrontendPageLoadTime TIMESERIES 15 minutes SINCE 6 hours ago

SELECT percentile(duration, 75) FROM FrontendCoreWebVital WHERE metricType = 
\LCP' TIMESERIES 30 minutes SINCE 6 hours ago
SELECT percentile(duration, 75) FROM FrontendCoreWebVital WHERE metricType = \FID' TIMESERIES 30 minutes SINCE 6 hours ago
SELECT percentile(duration, 75) FROM FrontendCoreWebVital WHERE metricType = \CLS' TIMESERIES 30 minutes SINCE 6 hours ago
SELECT count(*) FROM FrontendPageView FACET browser SINCE 24 hours ago
SELECT count(*) FROM FrontendPageView FACET deviceType SINCE 24 hours ago
SELECT count(*) FROM FrontendJavaScriptError TIMESERIES 30 minutes SINCE 6 hours ago
SELECT page, count(*) FROM FrontendPageView SINCE 24 hours ago ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT page, average(duration), count(*) FROM FrontendPageLoadTime SINCE 24 hours ago ORDER BY average(duration) DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT count(*) FROM FrontendUserInteraction FACET interactionType SINCE 24 hours ago
SELECT count(*) FROM FrontendJavaScriptError FACET errorType SINCE 24 hours ago
SELECT histogram(duration, 20, 100) FROM FrontendPageLoadTime SINCE 24 hours ago FACET page
